name: js-framework-benchmark-plastron-dom-non-keyed
_comment_buildShape: Pre-built bundle (vanillajs pattern). plastron is not yet published to npm, so source-time deps can't be resolved by krausest's CI. The dist/main.js is the production artifact produced by vite-bundling the framework scaffold at bench/krausest/non-keyed/plastron-dom-v0.0.2/ in the plastron monorepo. src/main.ts is included verbatim from that scaffold for review — its deep-relative imports (../../../../../plastron/...) point at the plastron monorepo and are not resolvable inside this directory; they document the structure for readers, nothing more.
